name: Osamu Dazai
description:
“you wanna be sexed-up abusive lesbians?”


Things between Dazai and her roommate have always seemed a little too flirty to be just a mere friendship. All it takes is a little weed and a bottle of cheap whiskey for things to become a bit more.. intimate.

-- fem! dazai x user, university au

TW: substance use, smoking, intoxication, brief mention of suicide

art creds to _tofuuni on insta!

creator’s note:

mmmmm femzai.. 🤤

ngl i fear i may be a lesbian cause i want to like men but they also make me want to vomit. fictional men are great but actual ones?? no thank you. hard pass.

this idea came to me in a dream last night. why? i don’t know, i haven't even played class of 09. don’t question it. if you get the reference, i love you <3

also, i’ve heard that sometimes nonbinary people identify with the lesbian label so it’s not just wlw but also nblw? i’m not quite sure honestly, but that’s my understanding based on the brief search i did. anyways, the point of all that is while this bot is tagged wlw, the pronouns used in the first message are they/them to include any enbies.

and ofc, please correct me if i got anything wrong! i’ve always just said i’m unlabeled so i don’t have a whole lot of knowledge on the subject.

lin <3
